summary: Iteration 140: Comprehensive testing of new Accounting module - 4 new pages (Chart of Accounts, Bills, Profit & Loss, Tax & Currency Settings) plus sidebar navigation. Backend: 23/23 tests passed after fixing a bug. Frontend: All pages load and function correctly.

fixed.issue: AttributeError on current_user.get() - Pydantic model accessed as dict
fixed.fix: Changed current_user.get() to getattr(current_user, ...) in accounting.py lines 223 and 275

critical_code_review_comments: Chart of Accounts: 23 default accounts seeded correctly on first access. 5 account types (Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense) with proper sub-types. System accounts protected from deletion.
Bills page: Correctly under FINANCE section. Bill creation with line items, VAT calculation (15% default), payment recording all working. Status filtering (All/Unpaid/Partial/Paid) functional.

Profit & Loss: Quick range buttons (Today, Week, Month, Quarter, Year) and custom date range working. Full P&L breakdown with Revenue, Cost of Sales, Gross Profit, Operating Expenses, Net Profit. Branch filter present.
Tax & Currency: 4 default tax rates (VAT 15%, VAT 5%, Zero Rated, Exempt) seeded. 11 Middle East currencies available. Default currency (SAR) selection working.
Sidebar: New ACCOUNTING section with Chart of Accounts, Profit & Loss, Tax & Currency links. Bills correctly under FINANCE section.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test accounts, tax rates, and bills which remain in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 140: Accounting module testing complete. 4 new pages added: Chart of Accounts (/chart-of-accounts), Bills (/bills), Profit & Loss (/profit-loss), Tax & Currency (/tax-settings). All backend APIs under /api/accounting/* working. Bug fixed in accounting.py (line 223, 275) - current_user is Pydantic model not dict. Test bills created with supplier names: 'Test Supplier', 'Payment Test Supplier', 'Full Payment Test'. Test tax rates created with names starting with 'Test Tax' and 'Update Tax'. Test accounts created with codes starting with 'TEST-', 'UPD-', 'DEL-'.

features_verified.chart_of_accounts: 23 default accounts, 5 types, type filters, search, add/edit/delete (non-system), system account protection
features_verified.bills: Create bill, line items, VAT calculation (subtotal + 15% VAT - discount = total), payment recording (partial/full), status management
features_verified.profit_loss: P&L report with Revenue/COGS/Gross/Operating Expenses/Net, quick date ranges, custom date range, branch filter
features_verified.tax_settings: 4 default VAT rates, add/edit/delete tax rates, 11 currencies, enable/disable currencies, default currency selection
features_verified.sidebar: New Accounting section with 3 links, Bills under Finance section
